mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRV_MEMBER (MEMBER_ID, USER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, EMAIL) VALUES (TRV_MEMBER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email})
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, USER_ID AS userId, PASSWORD AS password, NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email, JOIN_DATE AS joinDate FROM TRV_MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, USER_ID AS userId, PASSWORD AS password, NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email, JOIN_DATE AS joinDate FROM TRV_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
